CustomField.description: Indicates whether the utilization is for a partial month
CustomField.formula: IF(AND( leaseworks__Partial_Period_To__c == leaseworks__For_The_Month_Ending__c, leaseworks__Partial_Period_From__c == Date(YEAR(leaseworks__For_The_Month_Ending__c),MONTH(leaseworks__For_The_Month_Ending__c),1) ), false, true)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates whether the utilization is for a partial month
CustomField.label: Partial Month
